'''vobataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upface|upface]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-b-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upface|upface]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vobataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobatithi|vobatithi]] || [[word:vobatiji|vobatiji]] || [[word:vobatishi|vobatishi]] || [[word:vobatiki|vobatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobatuthuthu|vobatuthuthu]] || [[word:vobatujuju|vobatujuju]] || [[word:vobatushushu|vobatushushu]] || [[word:vobatukuku|vobatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobatuthu|vobatuthu]] || [[word:vobatuju|vobatuju]] || [[word:vobatushu|vobatushu]] || [[word:vobatuku|vobatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobatufthuf|vobatufthuf]] || [[word:vobatufjuf|vobatufjuf]] || [[word:vobatufshuf|vobatufshuf]] || [[word:vobatufkuf|vobatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobatethe|vobatethe]] || [[word:vobateje|vobateje]] || [[word:vobateshe|vobateshe]] || [[word:vobateke|vobateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobatothotho|vobatothotho]] || [[word:vobatojojo|vobatojojo]] || [[word:vobatoshosho|vobatoshosho]] || [[word:vobatokoko|vobatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobatotho|vobatotho]] || [[word:vobatojo|vobatojo]] || [[word:vobatosho|vobatosho]] || [[word:vobatoko|vobatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobatofthof|vobatofthof]] || [[word:vobatofjof|vobatofjof]] || [[word:vobatofshof|vobatofshof]] || [[word:vobatofkof|vobatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfthÃŸf|vobatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfjÃŸf|vobatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfshÃŸf|vobatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfkÃŸf|vobatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|vobatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|vobatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|vobatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|vobatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfthÃŸf|vobatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfjÃŸf|vobatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfshÃŸf|vobatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfkÃŸf|vobatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfthÃŸf|vobatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfjÃŸf|vobatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfshÃŸf|vobatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:vobatÃŸfkÃŸf|vobatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vobatÃḊthÃḊ|vobatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:vobatÃḊjÃḊ|vobatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:vobatÃḊshÃḊ|vobatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:vobatÃḊkÃḊ|vobatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vobatathatha|vobatathatha]] || [[word:vobatajaja|vobatajaja]] || [[word:vobatashasha|vobatashasha]] || [[word:vobatakaka|vobatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vobatatha|vobatatha]] || [[word:vobataja|vobataja]] || [[word:vobatasha|vobatasha]] || [[word:vobataka|vobataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vobatafthaf|vobatafthaf]] || [[word:vobatafjaf|vobatafjaf]] || [[word:vobatafshaf|vobatafshaf]] || [[word:vobatafkaf|vobatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vobatasha|vobatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobatshÃḋsha|vobatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobatrosha|vobatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobatmusha|vobatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobatyasha|vobatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobatnkshÃḋsha|govobatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobatnkrosha|govobatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobatnkmusha|govobatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobatnkyasha|govobatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vobabatasha|vobabatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobabatshÃḋsha|vobabatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobabatrosha|vobabatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobabatmusha|vobabatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobabatyasha|vobabatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobabatnkshÃḋsha|govobabatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobabatnkrosha|govobabatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobabatnkmusha|govobabatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobabatnkyasha|govobabatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vebÃḊtasha|vebÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vebÃḊtshÃḋsha|vebÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vebÃḊtrosha|vebÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vebÃḊtmusha|vebÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vebÃḊtyasha|vebÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govebÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|govebÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govebÃḊtnkrosha|govebÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govebÃḊtnkmusha|govebÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govebÃḊtnkyasha|govebÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vobfatasha|vobfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vobfatshÃḋsha|vobfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vobfatrosha|vobfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vobfatmusha|vobfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vobfatyasha|vobfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govobfatnkshÃḋsha|govobfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govobfatnkrosha|govobfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govobfatnkmusha|govobfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govobfatnkyasha|govobfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
